local_help.help:
INFO2 File: help

File is not supported, or it is probably not an INFO2 file.
local_help.man:
RIFIUTI(1)    extract information from MS recycle bin INFO2 files    RIFIUTI(1)

NAME
     rifiuti - tool to extract information from MS recycle bins info2 files.

SYNOPSIS
     rifiuti [-t] FILE

DESCRIPTION
     rifiuti is a tool to extract valuable information (from a forensics inves-
     tigator point of view) from MS recycle bins info2 files.

     It will extract the deleted time, original drive number, original path ans
     size of the deleted files found in the recycle bin.

OPTIONS
     -t FD
         Change the default field delimiter (TAB) to FD.

     <file>
         INFO2 file to parse.

AUTHOR
     This  manual  page  was  written  by  Christophe  Monniez <christophe.mon-
     niez@fccu.be> for the Debian project (but may be used by others).

20040505                           2008-03-14                        RIFIUTI(1)

apt_metadata.description:
MS Windows recycle bin analysis tool
Rifiuti is a tool to examine the INFO2 files. The INFO2 file gives meta
information about the files found in the MS Windows recycle bin.
.
This package is useful in forensics investigations.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use rifiuti because rifiuti - tool to extract information from MS recycle bins info2 files.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `rifiuti [-t] FILE` as documented upstream for rifiuti.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair rifiuti with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `rifiuti --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
